title: Wurmple Pack
description:
Adds models and animations for wurmple and its evolutions to Cobblemon 1.4

[No Longer Maintained]

For Cobblemon 1.6+ please see DeCube's MoMons which has an excellent Wurmple line as part of it.
body:
Adds models and animations for Wurmple and its evolutions to Cobblemon V1.4.

Can also be added as a datapack for spawns.
